About this hotelIn a multistory building close to shops and restaurants, this modern apartment hotel next to a major thoroughfare is a 6-minute walk from the nearest bus stop, and 9 km from both Saigon Hi-Tech Park and the landmark Bitexco Financial Tower.… MoreAiry, understated 2- to 4-bedroom apartments feature living rooms, kitchens, dining areas and laundry facilities. They also come with free Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs and iPod docks.Amenities include a gym, a sauna and a hot tub, plus an outdoor pool, a kids' pool and a playground. There's also a tennis court and a putting green. Parking is available for a fee, as is breakfast.Check-in time: 14:00Check-out time: 12:00Address & contact information628C Võ Nguyên Giáp, An Khánh, Hồ Chí Minh028 6255 9900WebsiteDirectionsAmenitiesClose dialogueGoogle collects information about hotel amenities from a variety of sources.
